backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the FarmSiddhi backend, defining data types and CRUD operations for user profiles, contact form entries, product details, and orders, with role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Motoko migration module that defines legacy and current data type schemas and seeds initial product data (rice, wheat, and other categories) when migrating actor state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs to their affected files, related components, test IDs, and confidence levels for features like product detail page, admin dashboard, and query hooks.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase structure and each file's purpose.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the FarmSiddhi React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with 11 routes, wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and CartProvider, and renders a shared Layout with Navigation, Footer, and lazy-loaded page components.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with the FarmSiddhi logo, contact info, social media links (LinkedIn, X, Facebook), and a copyright bar with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop and mobile nav links, and a cart icon that displays the current item count from CartContext.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: React context providing cart state management with add, remove, update quantity, and clear operations, plus derived cartTotal and itemCount values.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication via an AuthClient-backed React context, exposing login/clear functions and status flags, with an InternetIdentityProvider component for wrapping the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend interactions including fetching products, submitting contact forms, managing orders, and updating order status via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light/dark color themes, base body styles, and reusable utility component classes like section-container and watermark-container.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider contexts.
frontend/src/pages/AboutUs.tsx: Static About Us page displaying FarmSiddhi's vision, mission, and business model in a card-based layout.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for managing orders and contact form submissions, including order status updates and product catalog seeding functionality.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with quantity controls, line totals, and a checkout navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page with a form for buyer details and shipping address that submits an order via the usePlaceOrder hook and redirects to order confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUs.tsx: Contact Us page with a form for name, email, phone, user type, and message that submits to the backend via useSubmitContactForm, alongside static contact info.
frontend/src/pages/Exports.tsx: Displays the Export Services page with a grid of service cards (quality assurance, packaging, logistics, global trade, compliance) and an international certifications section.
frontend/src/pages/FarmerNetwork.tsx: Renders the Farmer Network page showcasing services like direct procurement, fair pricing, and supply chain digitization, along with a benefits section for farmers.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Implements the homepage with a hero section, platform introduction, services overview, and a product grid linking to individual product pages.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Shows an order confirmation page by reading order data from sessionStorage, displaying order ID, status, items, and customer details after a successful purchase.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Renders a product detail page for a given category, allowing users to select variants, adjust quantity, and add items to the cart, with variant-specific images mapped via lookup tables.
frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx: React page component that displays all product categories (Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Spices, Processed Foods, Makhana) with subcategories, images, badges, and links to detail pages. Includes fallback image mappings for subcategory items lacking dedicated images.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to extract URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, font families (Inter), and accordion keyframe animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file (version 67) describing FarmSiddhi's B2B agricultural export website architecture, known issues (broken e-commerce cart, admin page, product detail pages), and required image assets for all product subcategories.
